business_angle: NFS Plumbing & Heating: heating and plumbing with tidy finishes
distinctive_phrases: He's got a wide range of skills which include putting up walls and doors, tiling and of course neat and tidy pipework
He has worked without complaint when met with unpredictable obstacles and the finished job is excellent
Nick has done various bits of plumbing and heating work for us over the last few years
This has included boiler repairs, services, radiator installation and refitting and tiling a downstairs toilet

strongest_review_quote.text: Nick has done an excellent job on various projects in my house including installing a new flue, removing a gas fire and installing a downstairs toilet. Throughout all these tasks he's shown himself to be a thoughtful and capable engineer and adept at solving problems and coming up with creative solutions. He's got a wide range of skills which include putting up walls and doors, tiling and of course neat and tidy pipework.
strongest_review_quote.author: Tom

best_photos_rationale: Google Places photos preferred for gallery when high quality
claims_to_avoid: Supplier names as job locations in captions
